bracu_official.title: UG "Wishlist" Event Schedule, Fall 2026
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University announced the schedule for the Undergraduate "Wishlist" event for the Fall 2026 semester.

bracu_official.title: Notice of Award – B-113, ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD-2
bracu_official.summary: A notice regarding the award B-113, associated with ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD-2, has been issued.

bracu_official.title: Notice of Award – B-113, ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD-1
bracu_official.summary: A notice regarding the award B-113, associated with ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD-1, has been issued.

bracu_official.title: Recruitment Notice
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University has published a recruitment notice for potential applicants.

bracu_official.title: BRAC University seminar raises awareness on cervical cancer
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University hosted a seminar on July 9, 2026, to raise important awareness regarding cervical cancer.

bracu_official.title: ‘Eco-Friendly Cafeteria’ initiative encourages sustainable choices at BRAC University
bracu_official.summary: On July 7, 2026, BRAC University launched an ‘Eco-Friendly Cafeteria’ initiative to promote sustainable choices and environmental responsibility.

bracu_official.title: BRAC University law graduate awarded prestigious joint doctoral scholarship between the University of Glasgow and the University of Sydney
bracu_official.summary: A BRAC University law graduate was awarded a prestigious joint doctoral scholarship between the University of Glasgow and the University of Sydney on July 2, 2026.
